results.title: Devotees throng Gundicha Temple to witness ritual that humanises divinity
results.description: Devotees throng Puri’s Gundicha Temple for Hera Panchami, where Goddess Lakshmi confronts Lord Jagannath and a chariot is symbolically damaged.

results.title: 17 cabinet ministers who snubbed Starmer's last speech
results.description: Some names were noticeably absent as Sir Keir Starmer delivered his farewell speech outside 10 Downing Street on Monday morning.

results.title: Türkiye stands with Turkish Cypriots marking Peace and Freedom Day
results.description: The spirit of Peace and Freedom Day gripped the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus (TRNC) on Monday. Prominent guests from Türkiye joined locals to mark the anniversary of the 197...
